specs.title: defaults to Claimant role on load
defaults to claimant dashboard page on load
stat cards are visible on claimant dashboard
switching to Reviewer role updates topbar badge
switching to Reviewer shows reviewer queue page
switching to Approver role updates topbar badge
switching to Approver shows approver dashboard
switching to Admin role updates topbar badge
switching to Admin shows admin dashboard
switching role updates user name in topbar
switching roles updates sidebar nav items
shows claim history table with rows
"New Claim" button navigates to submit page
clicking claim row navigates to detail view
View button on claim row navigates to detail
form has Damage Amount number field
success "Back to Claims" returns to dashboard
detail page shows claim status badge
detail page shows assigned reviewer info
Review button navigates to claim detail
coverage shows Fire Damage as covered
reviewer notes textarea has pre-filled content
Send to Approver opens confirmation modal
modal can be closed with Cancel
confirming send to approver returns to queue
Back button returns to reviewer queue
Decide button navigates to approver detail
final decision dropdown has approve and reject options
approval notes textarea has pre-filled content
financial impact sidebar shows net payout
Back button returns to approver dashboard
claims by type table is shown
"Manage Users" button navigates to users page
users table shows all four roles
add user modal has name fields
add user modal has role dropdown
add user modal closes on Cancel
approved badge is present on completed claims
active nav item has active class
clicking nav item switches active page
reviewer role sidebar has correct nav items
admin role sidebar has Overview and Users
table cards render with headers and body
page has lang attribute on html element
form labels are associated with inputs
table headers are present for all tables
